text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 19. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
